segments.original_text: ピクミンが刺さってくる空前の後が見えるんですが

segments.text: Another up thrust into bair - that was risky!
segments.original_text: クールからもう一度上に突き上げて空後危なかった

segments.text: Using the armor to creep forward on stage gradually
segments.original_text: アーマーをうまく使ってラインをじわりじわり

segments.text: Taking damage but fighting back though
segments.original_text: 傷は負いながら帰ってくるんですが

segments.text: How far can they take it from here?
segments.original_text: どこまでやれるかここは

segments.text: 150 percent - that's way too much damage!
segments.original_text: 150あまりにも痛いパーセント

segments.text: Trading blows and that back throw seals it!
segments.original_text: 殴っていてこの後ろ投げは撃墜

full_text: Pikmin landing with that fair! Another up thrust into bair - that was risky! Airdodge gets out of it! Using the armor to creep forward on stage gradually Taking damage but fighting back though One stock left How far can they take it from here? No KO right now but... 150 percent - that's way too much damage! Two stocks remaining! Trading blows and that back throw seals it!

corrections.original: ピンが刺さってくる空中前の跡
corrections.corrected: ピクミンが刺さってくる空前の後
corrections.rule: character term: ピクミン + move abbreviation

corrections.original: ここ今日撃墜はないが
